title: La guerre et la paix, Tome I
summaries: "La guerre et la paix, Tome I" by graf Leo Tolstoy is a literary work published serially beginning in 1865, with the complete version published in 1869. Set during the Napoleonic Wars, it chronicles the French invasion of Russia through five interlocking narratives following different Russian aristocratic families. The work blends fictional storytelling with philosophical discussions about history, war, and power. Tolstoy himself hesitated to classify it as a novel, calling it something that defies conventional standards. It remains an internationally praised classic of world literature.
